The '''Desert of Simoom''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] on the [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It once contained a small forest which was the home of the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]. When the [[Phlog/Legends|Phlogs]] who lived in the nearby desert began constructing a palace for their [[Unidentified Phlog king|king]], they began chopping down the [[Tree/Legends|trees]] of Simoom's forest, forcing the Ewoks to flee to the other side of the moon.

==Behind the scenes==
In the real world, a [[Wikipedia:Simoom|''simoom'']] is a hot, dry, dusty wind in the desert.
